preamble.title: amaru.swap.v2-wrong
preamble.description: Deliberately wrong-shape CIP-57 blueprint for fixture 14-blueprint-decode-fail (T105 / S5). Declares the SwapOrder recipient field as a flat bytes leaf, with no Credential wrapper. The real on-chain SwapOrder payload carries Constr 0 [Constr 0 [B <pubKeyHash>]] (the Credential wrapper around the hash), so decodeBlueprintData hits BlueprintDataTypeMismatch "bytes" when it tries to read the inner Constr as a bytes leaf. Used to exercise the DecodeFailed branch in Cardano.Tx.Graph.Emit.Blueprint — the walker emits cardano:hasRawBytes plus exactly one cardano:decodeError literal on the Datum subject (FR-005 / D-001d).

SwapOrder.title: SwapOrder
SwapOrder.description: Wrong-shape: declares recipient as a flat bytes leaf at the top level, with no Credential / PubKeyCredential wrapper. The real payload's recipient is a Constr value, so the decoder rejects the field with BlueprintDataTypeMismatch "bytes".
